# Dillaaumar

*A world generated by Cartogenesis v0.12.0 from seed `cartogenesis`. Regenerate it exactly with `node src/cli.ts generate --seed cartogenesis`.*

## Overview

- **Extent:** 360 × 360 cells
- **Land / ocean:** 63.8% land, 36.2% ocean, 1 lake(s)
- **Climate & life:** dominant biome **Grassland**, 16 biomes in all
- **Peoples:** 28 regions, 26 settlements, 4 realms
- **Capital:** Bee, seat of House Cavonavea
- **Dominant power:** Nopa (of 5 surviving realm(s))
- **The present year:** 826 After Reckoning
- **Highest peak:** 4,500 m · **volcanoes:** 9 (3 active)

## Volcanoes

- **Mount Buska** — stratovolcano, dormant, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Skaustfjei** — stratovolcano, active, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Storkfjei** — stratovolcano, active, summit 4,500 m
- **Mount Thodontho** — shield, active, summit 4,500 m

- **Mount Aknau** — shield, extinct, summit 4,409 m
- **Mount Hreirnvonu** — stratovolcano, extinct, summit 4,233 m
- **Mount Gragrfjastu** — shield, dormant, summit 3,253 m

## Notable features

- **Mount Stonthuvik** — the highest peak
- **The Tashmiza** — the greatest river
- **Lake Laussorero** — the largest inland water

- Sipeca is a coast of rolling grassland, a country of vineyards and old stone towns, seat of Iabauti.
- Tukhaa is an inland reach of sun-scoured dunes, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars.
- Zaamaaur is an inland reach of sun-scoured dunes, its people caravan-traders and readers of stars, seat of Qeshzeraur.

## Notable figures

- **Eneve, the Heretic** — Eneve was exiled from Bee for denying the old gods.
- **Cauneo, the Scholar** — Cauneo mapped the waters of Laussorero.
- **Cidau, the Architect** — Cidau raised the great road between Bee and Saaghaa.
- **Mintereriatemar, the Explorer** — Mintereriatemar charted the far coasts and traced the Tashmiza to its source.

## Faiths

### the Way of Nicaudi — Nicaudi, god of the Sun

> Each dawn Nicaudi drives the sun over Stonthuvik; the people of Sipeca greet it with fire.

Followed across 13 region(s).

### the Rite of Umerreabad — Umerreabad, god of the Sea

> In the first age the waters covered all, until Umerreabad drew up the land and set the Tashmiza running to the sea.

Followed across 2 region(s).

### the Faith of Dogrbavik — Dogrbavik, god of the Harvest

> Dogrbavik scattered the first seed across Hreillbro; the golden fields were the gift, and the tithe the price.

Followed across 11 region(s).

### the Rite of Kansha — Kansha, god of the Storm

> Kansha rides the storms down the Tashmiza, and Zaamaaur both fears and blesses the rain.

Followed across 2 region(s).

- **Major exports:** Livestock, Grain, Horses, Wine, Stone
- **Wealthiest settlement:** Bee
- **Trade hubs:** Bee, Saaghaa, Naauleno, Maundoteoe
- **Deposits:** Iron ×41, Copper ×31, Gold ×15, Gems ×9, Stone ×100, Coal ×40, Timber ×6, Grain ×46, Livestock ×141, Fish ×11, Furs ×10, Spices ×1, Salt ×30, Horses ×35, Wine ×20

## Legends of the founding age

- **72 After Reckoning** — The city of Bee was founded on a sheltered harbour, destined to become the seat of power.
- **94 After Reckoning** — The city of Saaghaa was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **100 After Reckoning** — Bee rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Dillaaumar was proclaimed.
- **120 After Reckoning** — Saaghaa rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Judaesh was proclaimed.
- **121 After Reckoning** — The city of Iabauti was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **142 After Reckoning** — Iabauti rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Nopa was proclaimed.
- **143 After Reckoning** — The city of Siamordeco was founded on a sheltered harbour.
- **175 After Reckoning** — Siamordeco rose to rule its hinterland, and the realm of Neivia was proclaimed.
- **450 After Reckoning** — An academy founded on the shores of Laussorero gathered the age's finest cartographers.
- **612 After Reckoning** — Stonthuvik woke in fire and ash; a hard winter followed, and harvests failed across the land.
- **750 After Reckoning** — A great storm-tide flooded Bee; the lower quarters were lost to the sea.
- **802 After Reckoning** — Under a long peace, Bee flourished; its libraries and roads became the wonder of the world.

A real 360×360 16-bit heightmap is exported alongside this report (`.heightmap16.png` and raw `.heightmap.r16`). Import it into Blender, Unity, Godot, or World Machine and scale the height to **4,500 m** (value 65535 = 4,500 m above the lowest point). The topographic contour map (`.topo.png`) shows the same relief as isolines.
